data.name: BtnZeroC.ToolTip
data.value: Set C axis work-coordinate to zero

data.name: BtnZeroB.ToolTip
data.value: Set B axis work-coordinate to zero

data.name: BtnZeroA.ToolTip
data.value: Set A axis work-coordinate to zero

data.name: BtnZeroXYZ.ToolTip
data.value: Set XYZ axis work-coordinates to zero

data.name: BtnZeroXY.ToolTip
data.value: Set XY axis work-coordinates to zero

data.name: BtnZeroZ.ToolTip
data.value: Set Z axis work-coordinate to zero

data.name: BtnZeroY.ToolTip
data.value: Set Y axis work-coordinate to zero

data.name: BtnZeroX.ToolTip
data.value: Set X axis work-coordinate to zero
